commit_scope: Repair the native contribution read page projection by returning JSON pages from SQL instead of relying on BML row-list conversion for DB rows.

commands: cd form/form-kernel-rust && git show origin/main:deploy/front-door/api.bml > /tmp/origin-main-repair2-api.bml && ./target/release/form-kernel-rust check --routes /tmp/origin-main-repair2-api.bml --stdlib ../form-stdlib
local_validation.summary: The native contributors and contributions handlers now query page rows as a single JSON text column and parse that node into the response. This removes the row-list projection layer that produced items=[] while count_rows showed contributors total=169.

observed_delta.failed_repair_before: PR #2734 deployed native headers but Hostinger correctly failed the strengthened canary; public contributors still returned total=169 and items=[].
observed_delta.new_projection: api-contributors-page-json-sql and api-contributions-page-json-sql build jsonb_agg(row_json) pages in Postgres. BML emits the parsed JSON node directly as response.items.
observed_delta.guard_state: The existing strengthened Hostinger and public deploy checks remain in place and will fail if contributors total remains nonzero with an empty item page.

known_limitations.observed: No local Postgres is running in the worktree. The decisive proof is the already-failing strengthened Hostinger canary plus post-deploy public curl.
form-kernel-rust check --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml reports the same 14 unresolved full-catalog names on origin/main and this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: Post-merge deploy must show native headers and contributors items[0] as an object.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native contributors route returns contributor row objects through SQL-built JSON pages.
test_flows: Use strengthened deploy canary to reject empty contributors pages.
Emit SQL-built JSON page nodes from BML handlers.
Verify public contributors body after deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local source proof is complete. PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before claiming release.
